innateAbility.name: Slow Burn
innateAbility.description: All Lina's spells now applies a portion of the impact damage as damage over time.

abilities.name: Dragon Slave
abilities.description: Sends out a wave of fire that scorches every enemy in its path.

abilities.name: Light Strike Array
abilities.description: Stuns and damages enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Fiery Soul
abilities.description: Grants a stack of bonus attack speed and bonus movement speed per enemy unit affected per ability cast.

abilities.name: Flame Cloak
abilities.description: Lina ascends and grants herself unobstructed movement, spell damage amplification and bonus magic resistance.

abilities.name: Laguna Blade
abilities.description: Fires off a bolt of lightning at a single enemy unit, dealing massive damage.
